properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Welcomed in to the courts of the King/ I've been ushered into your presence/ Lord I stand on your merciful ground/ Yet with every step tread with reverence

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And I'll fall facedown As your glory shines around, Yes, I'll fall facedown As your glory shines around.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Who is there in the heavens like you/ And upon the earth who's your equal/ You are far above you're the highest of heights/ We are bowing down to exalt you

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: So let your glory shine around! Let your glory shine around! King of glory here be found! King of glory!
